hero.description: Get your dream trip planned with trusted local recommendations, safe navigation, scam alerts, and transport help — all in one premium experience.
faq.title: Most asked FAQ's
faq.subtitle: We're here to help you and solve doubts. Find answers to the most common questions below.
faq.q1: What is included in the Starter plan?
faq.a1: The Starter plan includes access to all basic features, 5GB of storage, and email support. It's perfect for individuals and small projects.
faq.q2: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.a2: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for all our plans. No credit card is required to start.
faq.a3: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express) and PayPal.
faq.a5: We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to ensure your data is safe and protected at all times.
faq.a6: We pledge to donate 2% of our annual revenue to environmental causes and non-profit organizations.
faq.q7: Can I integrate this platform with other tools?
faq.a7: Yes, we offer seamless integration with popular tools like Slack, Trello, and Google Workspace.
faq.a8: Our platform is built with a focus on user experience, speed, and reliability, ensuring you get the best results with minimal effort.
footer.tagline: Simplifying your journey through incredible landscapes and cultures.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get travel tips and exclusive local guides.
pricing.title: OUR PRICING
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your goals and scale. Every plan includes powerful travel tools, offline access, and all the features you need without limits.
pricing.free.name: Starter
pricing.pro.name: Explorer Plan
pricing.pro.desc: Perfect for frequent travelers and groups
pricing.custom.name: Premium Concierge
pricing.custom.desc: Full support for organizations and large groups
features.title: Premium features built for real tourist pain points.
features.desc: This is not just a map app. It combines local intelligence, trust signals, scam prevention, and tourist personalization in one premium experience.
features.f1.title: Smart Offline Navigation
features.f1.desc: Clear walking routes, landmarks, and confidence scoring for dense tourist areas and medinas.
features.f2.title: Anti-Scam Prevention
features.f2.desc: Alerts for fake guides, overpricing patterns, pressure-selling zones, and misleading claims.
features.f3.title: Verified Local Recommendations
features.f3.desc: Trusted riads, restaurants, artisans, cafés, cultural sites, and official guides.
features.f4.title: AI Personalized Planning
features.f4.desc: Adaptive suggestions based on travel style, budget, language, group type, and preferences.
features.f5.title: Transport Price Guidance
features.f5.desc: Estimated fair pricing for taxis and transfers to reduce uncertainty and tourist abuse.
features.f6.title: Safety Profiles
features.f6.desc: Modes for solo women, families, seniors, and first-time visitors with tailored advice.
mvp.title: Experience the difference.
mvp.desc: Trippple is designed to be your local companion, ensuring every step of your Morocco adventure is safe, authentic, and stress-free.
